evidence_scope: existing project seed sample
text: Personal data shall be processed lawfully, fairly and in a transparent manner in relation to the data subject.
notes: R13.3 seed sample. GDPR Article 5(1)(a). Passive obligation with embedded transparency constraint.

evidence_scope: existing project seed sample
text: Personal data shall be collected for specified, explicit and legitimate purposes and not further processed in a manner that is incompatible with those purposes.
notes: R13.3 seed sample. GDPR Article 5(1)(b). Contains embedded negative constraint about incompatible further processing.

evidence_scope: existing project seed sample
text: Personal data shall be adequate, relevant and limited to what is necessary in relation to the purposes for which they are processed.
notes: R13.3 seed sample. GDPR Article 5(1)(c). Data minimisation principle with conditional relevance to purpose.

evidence_scope: existing project seed sample
text: Where processing is based on consent, the controller shall be able to demonstrate that the data subject has consented to processing of his or her personal data.
notes: R13.3 seed sample. GDPR Article 7(1). Conditional obligation triggered by consent-based processing.

evidence_scope: existing project seed sample
text: Processing of personal data revealing racial or ethnic origin, political opinions, religious or philosophical beliefs, or trade union membership, and the processing of genetic data, biometric data for the purpose of uniquely identifying a natural person, data concerning health or data concerning a natural person's sex life or sexual orientation shall be prohibited.
notes: R13.3 seed sample. GDPR Article 9(1). Broad prohibition with enumerated special categories.

evidence_scope: existing project seed sample
text: Natürliche Personen, die im Inland einen Wohnsitz oder ihren gewöhnlichen Aufenthalt haben, sind unbeschränkt einkommensteuerpflichtig.
notes: R13.3 seed sample. Austrian EStG § 1 Abs 1. Classification rule defining unlimited tax liability based on residence.

evidence_scope: existing project seed sample
text: Unbeschränkt steuerpflichtig sind jene natürlichen Personen, die im Inland einen Wohnsitz oder ihren gewöhnlichen Aufenthalt haben. Die unbeschränkte Steuerpflicht erstreckt sich auf alle in- und ausländischen Einkünfte.
notes: R13.3 seed sample. Austrian EStG § 1 Abs 2. Two-clause sentence: classification + scope of unlimited liability.

evidence_scope: existing project seed sample
text: Beschränkt steuerpflichtig sind jene natürlichen Personen, die im Inland weder einen Wohnsitz noch ihren gewöhnlichen Aufenthalt haben. Die beschränkte Steuerpflicht erstreckt sich nur auf die im § 98 aufgezählten Einkünfte.
notes: R13.3 seed sample. Austrian EStG § 1 Abs 3. Two-clause sentence defining limited tax liability and its scope.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: The data subject may withdraw his or her consent at any time, without affecting the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.
notes: Controlled-authored GDPR-style permission. GDPR Article 7(3) inspired. Simple right-of-withdrawal sentence.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Where the processing is necessary for the purposes of the legitimate interests pursued by the controller or by a third party, and such interests are not overridden by the interests or fundamental rights and freedoms of the data subject, the processing shall be lawful.
notes: Controlled-authored GDPR-style. Legitimate interest balancing test pattern. Multi-condition obligation.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: The prohibition on processing special categories of personal data shall not apply if the data subject has given explicit consent to the processing for one or more specified purposes, except where Union or Member State law provides that the prohibition may not be lifted by the data subject.
notes: Controlled-authored GDPR-style. Article 9(2)(a) inspired. Prohibition with explicit exception clause and a further exception-to-exception.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: The controller shall provide the data subject with the identity and contact details of the controller, the contact details of the data protection officer, the purposes of the processing, and the legal basis for the processing at the time when personal data are obtained.
notes: Controlled-authored GDPR-style. GDPR Article 13(1) inspired. Information duty with enumerated disclosure items.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Appropriate technical and organisational measures shall be implemented by the controller both at the time of the determination of the means for processing and at the time of the processing itself in order to effectively implement data protection principles.
notes: Controlled-authored GDPR-style. GDPR Article 25(1) inspired. Data protection by design with temporal condition.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Each controller and processor shall maintain a record of processing activities under its responsibility, containing the name and contact details of the controller, the purposes of the processing, a description of the categories of data subjects and categories of personal data, and where applicable transfers of personal data to a third country.
notes: Controlled-authored GDPR-style. GDPR Article 30(1) inspired. Record-keeping obligation with detailed content specification.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Personal data means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person who can be identified directly or indirectly by reference to an identifier such as a name, an identification number, location data, or an online identifier.
notes: Controlled-authored GDPR-style. GDPR Article 4(1) inspired. Definition of personal data with enumerated identifier examples.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Taxpayers shall submit an annual income tax return to the competent tax office by the end of April of the following calendar year when their total annual income exceeds the statutory threshold.
notes: Controlled-authored Austrian tax style. Filing obligation with conditional threshold trigger.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Married couples who both have unlimited tax liability and who do not live permanently separated may opt for joint assessment of their income tax.
notes: Controlled-authored Austrian tax style. Optional joint assessment with multiple residency conditions.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Expenses incurred for the personal living expenses of the taxpayer or the taxpayer's family members shall not be deducted from taxable income under any circumstances.
notes: Controlled-authored Austrian tax style. Deduction prohibition for personal living expenses.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Income from employment is exempt from income tax up to an annual amount of fifteen thousand euros, provided that the taxpayer has no other sources of income and the total annual income does not exceed this threshold, unless the taxpayer voluntarily opts for standard assessment.
notes: Controlled-authored Austrian tax style. Tax exemption with threshold condition, further income restriction, and opt-out exception.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: The taxable income shall be computed as the total amount of income from all seven income categories after deduction of special expenses, extraordinary burdens, and tax allowances, and the resulting amount shall be rounded down to whole euros.
notes: Controlled-authored Austrian tax style. Income computation rule with deduction enumeration and rounding instruction.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: The income tax assessment notice shall be issued by the tax office in writing and shall contain the amount of taxable income, the applicable tax rate, the computed tax liability, and any tax credits applied.
notes: Controlled-authored Austrian tax style. Assessment notice issuance obligation with enumerated content requirements.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Where the taxpayer's total annual income exceeds one million euros, the applicable tax rate shall be fifty-five percent for the portion of income exceeding that threshold, provided that the taxpayer has not claimed any extraordinary tax relief measures in the same assessment period.
notes: Controlled-authored Austrian tax style. Progressive rate rule with high-income threshold and relief-exception condition.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Business expenses are all expenditures or outlays that are incurred through the operation of a business and that are objectively connected to the business activity, including but not limited to costs of materials, personnel expenses, depreciation of fixed assets, and interest on business loans.
notes: Controlled-authored Austrian tax style. Business expense definition with enumerated categories.

evidence_scope: synthetic-style sample authored for controlled experiment
text: Income is the total amount of all revenues in money or money's worth that accrue to a person within a calendar year from employment, self-employment, business operations, capital assets, rental and leasing, agriculture and forestry, and other recurring benefits.
notes: Controlled-authored Austrian tax style. Income definition with seven category enumeration.
